sorry_locations.notes: All 6 sorry in WrapAngle: wrapRat floor arithmetic (wrapRat_ge_lo, wrapRat_lt_hi, wrapRat_in_range, wrapRat_periodic, wrapRat_congruent, wrapRat_zero). Need Mathlib.Algebra.Order.Floor.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768
LATENT BUG (confirmed by FV + 334 correspondence tests): wrap_bin(bin, n) returns negative for bin <= -n-1; C++ truncation mod; callers use result as array index => UB

correspondence_tests.bin_at_angle: tests/bin_at_angle/ (334/334 pass; confirms getBinI/getOffsetBinI exact for integer-aligned angles; demonstrates wrap_bin latent bug)

targets.name: Crc16Sig
targets.notes: crc16_add bit-by-bit CCITT + crc16_signature fold. CRC16_OUTPUT_XOR=0 simplifies to pure foldl.

tasks: Task 5: Crc16Sig.lean — crc16_add + crc16_signature fold/split (8 theorems, 0 sorry)
Task 10: REPORT.md updated 388 theorems, 29 files, 9 layers, 187 examples
run_history.notes: Merged PRs #63-#67 at run start (Basic.lean conflict resolved manually). Crc16Sig completes target 29 from TARGETS.md. REPORT.md fully updated with all new files from runs 67-71.

tasks: Task 6: CORRESPONDENCE.md extended to 28 Lean files (34 C++ targets)
Task 8: Route B tests for bin_at_angle (334 cases, all passing)

discoveries: Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma (run 67)
Int.sub_emod a b n : (a - b) % n = (a%n - b%n) % n — key for congruence proofs (run 67)
Int.fmod_nonneg_of_pos a (h : 0 < b) : 0 ≤ a.fmod b — works for any sign of a (run 67)
omega can prove fdiv_mul_le via: have h1 := fdiv_mul_add_fmod; have h2 := fmod_nonneg_of_pos; omega
CRC16_OUTPUT_XOR = 0x0000 in crc.h — crc16_signature is a pure foldl (no XOR needed)
crc16sig fold/split: simp [crc16sig, List.foldl_append] proves crc16sig_append; simp [crc16sig] suffices for concrete examples
CORRESPONDENCE.md: complete coverage achieved at run 70 (28 files, 34 C++ targets)
Route B tests: Python % is Euclidean (same as Lean Int.emod for n > 0) — simplifies test scripts
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1; for typical n=36, need bin <= -37
notes: Run 71: Crc16Sig.lean proves crc16_signature fold/split (8 thms, 0 sorry). REPORT.md fully updated: 388 theorems, 29 files, 9 layers. Next suggested: Task 7 (critique update), Task 11 (conference paper update for new targets/theorems).
